$Repo = "Civic-Guardian/Civic-AI"

Write-Host "Creating labels..."

$labels = @(
    @{name="mobile"; color="36A2EB"},
    @{name="backend"; color="FF5733"},
    @{name="admin"; color="8E44AD"},
    @{name="ai"; color="27AE60"},
    @{name="website"; color="3498DB"},
    @{name="infrastructure"; color="F39C12"},
    @{name="database"; color="E74C3C"}
)

foreach ($label in $labels) {
    gh api "repos/$Repo/labels" `
        -f name="$($label.name)" `
        -f color="$($label.color)" 2>$null
}

Write-Host "Labels ready."

$issues = @(

# MOBILE
@{Title="Google Sign In"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="User Profile Management"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Multi Language Support"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Occupation Based User Preferences"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Offline Report Storage"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Auto Sync Offline Reports"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Image Based Issue Reporting"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Video Based Issue Reporting"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Voice To Text Reporting"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Manual Description Reporting"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Geo Location Capture"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Google Maps Integration"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Live Hazard Map"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Nearby Hazard Discovery"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Hazard Marker Clustering"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Community Verification System"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="False Report Detection"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Vote Based Verification"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Resolved Issue Confirmation"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Real Time Issue Tracking"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Issue Status Timeline"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Issue Progress Updates"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Issue Resolution Tracking"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Navigation Safety Alerts"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Upcoming Hazard Warning"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Journey Monitoring"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Route Risk Detection"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Push Notifications"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Emergency Alerts"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Area Based Notifications"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Gamification System"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Citizen Contribution Score"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Badges And Achievements"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Top Contributors Leaderboard"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Impact Dashboard"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Cases Reported Statistics"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Cases Resolved Statistics"; Label="mobile"},
@{Title="Community Impact Metrics"; Label="mobile"},

# BACKEND
@{Title="Setup Laravel 12 Project"; Label="backend"},
@{Title="Configure Sanctum Authentication"; Label="backend"},
@{Title="Firebase Authentication Integration"; Label="backend"},
@{Title="Hazard CRUD APIs"; Label="backend"},
@{Title="Verification APIs"; Label="backend"},
@{Title="Notification APIs"; Label="backend"},
@{Title="Maps APIs"; Label="backend"},

@{Title="Email Complaint Generation"; Label="backend"},
@{Title="Complaint Escalation System"; Label="backend"},
@{Title="Activity Logging System"; Label="backend"},
@{Title="Queue System Setup"; Label="backend"},

# DATABASE
@{Title="Create Users Table"; Label="database"},
@{Title="Create Hazard Categories Table"; Label="database"},
@{Title="Create Hazards Table"; Label="database"},
@{Title="Create Hazard Images Table"; Label="database"},
@{Title="Create Verifications Table"; Label="database"},
@{Title="Create Notifications Table"; Label="database"},
@{Title="Create Activity Logs Table"; Label="database"},
@{Title="Create Hazard Timelines Table"; Label="database"},
@{Title="Create AI Analysis Table"; Label="database"},
@{Title="Create AI Logs Table"; Label="database"},
@{Title="Create Settings Table"; Label="database"},

# AI
@{Title="Gemini Integration"; Label="ai"},
@{Title="AI Powered Issue Categorization"; Label="ai"},
@{Title="AI Severity Detection"; Label="ai"},
@{Title="AI Generated Issue Summary"; Label="ai"},
@{Title="AI Confidence Scoring"; Label="ai"},
@{Title="AI Duplicate Issue Detection"; Label="ai"},
@{Title="Predictive Insights"; Label="ai"},
@{Title="High Risk Area Prediction"; Label="ai"},
@{Title="Hazard Density Analytics"; Label="ai"},
@{Title="City Safety Score"; Label="ai"},
@{Title="Smart Hazard Alert Engine"; Label="ai"},

# ADMIN
@{Title="Admin Dashboard Layout"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Dashboard Statistics Cards"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Live Hazard Monitoring Map"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Recent Reports Widget"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Recent Activities Widget"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Case Management Module"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Case Detail View"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Verify Case Workflow"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Resolve Case Workflow"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Reject False Reports"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="User Management Module"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Suspend User"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="View User Contributions"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="AI Monitoring Center"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="AI Usage Statistics"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="AI Classification Logs"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="AI Prompt Configuration"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Activity Logs Module"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="User Activity Logs"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Admin Activity Logs"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Case Audit Timeline"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Analytics Dashboard"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Reports By Category Chart"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Resolution Rate Analytics"; Label="admin"},
@{Title="Verification Analytics"; Label="admin"},

# WEBSITE
@{Title="Landing Page"; Label="website"},
@{Title="About Page"; Label="website"},
@{Title="Features Page"; Label="website"},
@{Title="Statistics Page"; Label="website"},
@{Title="Download App Page"; Label="website"},
@{Title="Contact Page"; Label="website"},
@{Title="Public Hazard Map"; Label="website"},

# INFRASTRUCTURE
@{Title="Google Cloud Storage Integration"; Label="infrastructure"},
@{Title="WebP Image Optimization"; Label="infrastructure"},
@{Title="Thumbnail Generation"; Label="infrastructure"},
@{Title="Firebase Cloud Messaging Setup"; Label="infrastructure"},
@{Title="Cloud Run Deployment"; Label="infrastructure"},
@{Title="Production Environment Setup"; Label="infrastructure"},
@{Title="SSL Configuration"; Label="infrastructure"},
@{Title="Monitoring And Error Tracking"; Label="infrastructure"}
yes
)

foreach ($issue in $issues) {

    Write-Host "Creating: $($issue.Title)"

    gh api "repos/$Repo/issues" `
        -f title="$($issue.Title)" `
        -f body="Auto-generated feature task for NagarRakshak." `
        -f labels[]="$($issue.Label)" | Out-Null
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "================================="
Write-Host "All issues created successfully."
Write-Host "================================="
